results.comment_text:
@user1:
`default_slug_value` never changes so it doesn't have to be passed as an argument; it could be a constant at the module level.
results.test_code:
# AUTO-GENERATED by split_acceptance_tests.py
# Each original test function was split into one function per top-level
# assertion so pytest reports per-check pass/fail counts.
import re

def test_default_slug_value_is_module_level_constant_and_not_function_arg__a1():
    source = open('/workspace/saleor/warehouse/migrations/0003_warehouse_slug.py', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert 'DEFAULT_SLUG_VALUE' in source, 'Expected module-level constant DEFAULT_SLUG_VALUE to be defined.'

def test_default_slug_value_is_module_level_constant_and_not_function_arg__a2():
    source = open('/workspace/saleor/warehouse/migrations/0003_warehouse_slug.py', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert 'DEFAULT_SLUG_VALUE = "warehouse"' in source, 'Expected DEFAULT_SLUG_VALUE to be set to "warehouse" at module level.'

def test_default_slug_value_is_module_level_constant_and_not_function_arg__a3():
    source = open('/workspace/saleor/warehouse/migrations/0003_warehouse_slug.py', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert 'default_slug_value = ' not in source, "Expected no local 'default_slug_value' variable; it should be a module-level constant."

def test_default_slug_value_is_module_level_constant_and_not_function_arg__a4():
    source = open('/workspace/saleor/warehouse/migrations/0003_warehouse_slug.py', encoding='utf-8').read()
    m = re.search('def\\s+generate_unique_slug\\s*\\(([^)]*)\\)\\s*:', source)
    assert m, 'Expected to find generate_unique_slug() definition.'

def test_default_slug_value_is_module_level_constant_and_not_function_arg__a5():
    source = open('/workspace/saleor/warehouse/migrations/0003_warehouse_slug.py', encoding='utf-8').read()
    m = re.search('def\\s+generate_unique_slug\\s*\\(([^)]*)\\)\\s*:', source)
    params = [p.strip() for p in m.group(1).split(',') if p.strip()]
    assert 'default_slug_value' not in params, "generate_unique_slug() should not accept 'default_slug_value'; it should use DEFAULT_SLUG_VALUE."

def test_default_slug_value_is_module_level_constant_and_not_function_arg__a6():
    source = open('/workspace/saleor/warehouse/migrations/0003_warehouse_slug.py', encoding='utf-8').read()
    m = re.search('def\\s+generate_unique_slug\\s*\\(([^)]*)\\)\\s*:', source)
    params = [p.strip() for p in m.group(1).split(',') if p.strip()]
    assert 'generate_unique_slug(warehouse, slug_values, default_slug_value)' not in source, 'Expected generate_unique_slug() to be called without passing default_slug_value.'

def test_default_slug_value_is_module_level_constant_and_not_function_arg__a7():
    source = open('/workspace/saleor/warehouse/migrations/0003_warehouse_slug.py', encoding='utf-8').read()
    m = re.search('def\\s+generate_unique_slug\\s*\\(([^)]*)\\)\\s*:', source)
    params = [p.strip() for p in m.group(1).split(',') if p.strip()]
    assert 'slugify(instance.name) if instance.name else DEFAULT_SLUG_VALUE' in source, 'Expected generate_unique_slug() to use DEFAULT_SLUG_VALUE when instance.name is falsy.'

from django.db import migrations, models
from django.db.models.functions import Lower
from django.utils.text import slugify


def create_unique_slug_for_warehouses(apps, schema_editor):
    Warehouse = apps.get_model("warehouse", "Warehouse")

    default_slug_value = "warehouse"
    warehouses = (
        Warehouse.objects.filter(slug__isnull=True).order_by(Lower("name")).iterator()
    )
    previous_char = None
    slug_values = []
    for warehouse in warehouses:
        if warehouse.name:
            first_char = warehouse.name[0].lower()
            if first_char != previous_char:
                previous_char = first_char
                slug_values = list(
                    Warehouse.objects.filter(slug__istartswith=first_char).values_list(
                        "slug", flat=True
                    )
                )
        elif previous_char is None:
            previous_char = ""
            slug_values = list(
                Warehouse.objects.filter(
                    slug__istartswith=default_slug_value
                ).values_list("slug", flat=True)
            )

        slug = generate_unique_slug(warehouse, slug_values, default_slug_value)
        warehouse.slug = slug
        warehouse.save(update_fields=["slug"])
        slug_values.append(slug)


def generate_unique_slug(instance, slug_values, default_slug_value):
    slug = slugify(instance.name) if instance.name else default_slug_value
    unique_slug = slug
    extension = 1

    while unique_slug in slug_values:
        extension += 1
        unique_slug = f"{slug}-{extension}"

    return unique_slug


class Migration(migrations.Migration):

    dependencies = [
        ("warehouse", "0002_auto_20200123_0036"),
    ]

    operations = [
        migrations.AddField(
            model_name="warehouse",
            name="slug",
            field=models.SlugField(null=True, max_length=255, unique=True),
            preserve_default=False,
        ),
        migrations.RunPython(
            create_unique_slug_for_warehouses, migrations.RunPython.noop
        ),
        migrations.AlterField(
            model_name="warehouse",
            name="slug",
            field=models.SlugField(max_length=255, unique=True),
        ),
    ]
